description: Create a daily GitHub Actions workflow named test-p4c-ubuntu-18.04 that runs on a schedule, on push to main, and on pull requests to main with the run-ubuntu18 label. In an ubuntu-latest job, recursively check out the repository, set up ccache with a 1000M size limit, build a Docker image for p4c on Ubuntu 18.04 with GCC, and run tests in a privileged Docker container with ctest.
